series_metadata.series_description: To document the inventory, storage, and disposition of vehicles, registration plates, and contents recovered, seized, or impounded by division officers. Form: HP-25D

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two (2) years current if not entered into Law Enforcement Automated Data System (LEADS). ; Electronic: two (2) years current if entered into LEADS / attached online application. Documents will automatically purge from system
